title: neooreophilus nummularius
intro: Neooreophilus nummularius, commonly known as the pennywort plant, is a type of aquatic plant native to Southeast Asia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like iron and calcium. The health benefits of Neooreophilus nummularius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and support eye health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
